vaultPath.label: Vault Path
vaultPath.help: Path to your ClawVault vault directory

collection.label: QMD Collection
collection.help: Name of the qmd search collection

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories before each agent turn

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically observe and capture important information from conversations

recallLimit.label: Recall Limit
recallLimit.help: Max memories to inject per turn (default: 5)
